name: NBT BANCORP INC
business: NBT Bancorp Inc. is a financial holding company providing commercial banking, retail banking, and wealth management services. It operates through NBT Bank and subsidiaries including retirement plan administration and insurance agency. Customers include retail, commercial, and municipal customers in upstate New York, northeastern Pennsylvania, southern New Hampshire, western Massachusetts, Vermont, southern Maine, and central and northwestern Connecticut.

exposures.sentence: New technologies such as AI may be more capable of evading safeguard measures.

The Company faces operational risks and cybersecurity risks associated with incidents which have the potential to disrupt our operations, cause material harm to our financial condition, result in misappropriation of assets, compromise confidential information and/or damage our business relationships.
Through NBT Holdings, the Company operates NBT Insurance Agency, LLC ( NBT Insurance ), a full-service regional insurance agency acquired by the Company on September 1, 2008.
We also offer certain customer services, such as agricultural lending, that many of our larger competitors do not offer.
Residential mortgage loans consist primarily of loans secured by a first or second mortgage on primary residences.
Residential solar loans are in a planned-run off status.
